description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a prominent gable roof and a combination of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, a single-car garage with a driveway, and a car parked outside. The house has multiple rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some windows featuring decorative trim. The roof is steeply pitched and includes a chimney, while the yard is paved with a geometric black-and-white pattern interspersed with green strips. The overall design is modern with traditional elements, and the house appears to be constructed primarily from brick, concrete, and wood.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, covered porch, garage, and geometric paved yard, featuring dark and light exterior finishes and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entry, garage, driveway, and car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, dark wall with three windows and the car parked beside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with two windows and the geometric yard pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall with two windows and the chimney on the roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and overhanging roof
